metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop competencies in digital media production, social media strategy, and visual communication. This course emphasizes creating and distributing content across digital platforms while understanding audience engagement and communication best practices.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in digital media production, social media strategy, and visual communication.

big_ideas.statement: Digital communication has transformed how individuals and organizations share information, build communities, and influence audiences.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding digital platforms, audience dynamics, and communication strategies enables effective participation in digital environments.

big_ideas.statement: Visual communication and storytelling are powerful tools for engaging audiences and conveying complex messages effectively.
big_ideas.elaboration: Proficiency in visual design, video production, and multimedia creation enhances communication impact across digital channels.

big_ideas.statement: Social media strategy requires understanding audience psychology, platform affordances, and content optimization for engagement.
big_ideas.elaboration: Effective social media communication balances authentic engagement with strategic objectives and ethical practices.

big_ideas.statement: Digital citizenship involves responsible communication, ethical content creation, and awareness of online impact and privacy.
big_ideas.elaboration: Critical evaluation of digital media and responsible online behaviour support positive digital communities.

competencies.raw: Design digital communication campaigns and content strategies
i_can_statements: I can develop digital communication plans aligned with objectives
I can design content calendars and publishing schedules
I can create messaging strategies for target audiences
I can plan multi-platform digital campaigns

competencies.raw: Plan media production projects and visual communication
i_can_statements: I can develop concepts for video and multimedia projects
I can plan production timelines and resource requirements
I can design visual communication layouts and compositions
I can plan photography and visual content creation

competencies.raw: Design social media strategies and engagement approaches
i_can_statements: I can analyze platforms and identify appropriate channels
I can design engagement strategies for audiences
I can plan influencer and partnership collaborations
I can design community management strategies

competencies.raw: Evaluate digital communication effectiveness and audience engagement
i_can_statements: I can establish metrics for digital campaign success
I can analyze audience engagement and reach
I can evaluate content performance across platforms
I can recommend content and strategy improvements

competencies.raw: Produce digital media including video, audio, and multimedia content
i_can_statements: I can produce short-form and long-form video content
I can record and edit audio and podcast content
I can create animated and motion graphics
I can produce interactive multimedia presentations

competencies.raw: Create visual communication materials and designs
i_can_statements: I can design graphics for digital and print
I can create infographics and data visualizations
I can produce photography and image editing
I can design layouts for web and digital media

competencies.raw: Manage social media presence and community engagement
i_can_statements: I can create engaging social media content
I can manage social media accounts and posting schedules
I can engage with audiences and respond to comments
I can analyze social media metrics and performance

competencies.raw: Write compelling content for digital platforms
i_can_statements: I can write headlines and engaging social media copy
I can create video scripts and storyboards
I can write blog posts and web content
I can optimize content for search and discoverability

competencies.raw: Use media production tools and software for content creation
i_can_statements: I can use video editing software
I can use audio editing and production software
I can use graphic design tools
I can use photography and image editing software

competencies.raw: Operate digital media equipment and production tools
i_can_statements: I can operate cameras and video recording equipment
I can use lighting and audio equipment
I can set up and troubleshoot production technology
I can maintain and care for media equipment

competencies.raw: Use social media platforms and management tools
i_can_statements: I can navigate and use social media platforms
I can use social media management and scheduling tools
I can use analytics tools for social media monitoring
I can use advertising and promotion tools on platforms
I can assess new platforms and communication channels
I can understand livestreaming and real-time content
I can evaluate virtual and augmented reality applications
I can identify emerging trends in digital communication

areas.name: Digital Media Production
topics: Video production: planning, shooting, editing, and publishing
Audio production: recording, editing, and podcast creation
Photography: composition, lighting, editing, and optimization

areas.name: Visual Communication and Design
topics: Design principles: colour, typography, composition, contrast

areas.name: Social Media Strategy and Management
topics: Social media platforms: features, audiences, and best practices
Analytics and measurement of social media success

areas.name: Digital Citizenship and Ethics
topics: Mental health and wellbeing in digital spaces
